@@ -10,839 +10,66 @@

-%0A

-(%0A%09%22bufio%22%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22os%22%0A%09%22strings%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc precedence(op string) int %7B%0A%09switch op %7B%0A%09case %22+%22, %22-%22:%0A%09%09return 1%0A%09case %22*%22, %22/%22:%0A%09%09return 2%0A%09case %22%5E%22:%0A%09%09return 3%0A%09%7D%0A%09return 0%0A%7D%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09scanner := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin)%0A%09if !scanner.Scan() %7B%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%09input := scanner.Text()%0A%09tokens := strings.Fields(input)%0A%0A%09var output %5B%5Dstring%0A%09var stack %5B%5Dstring%0A%0A%09for _, token := range tokens %7B%0A%09%09if precedence(token) == 0 %7B%0A%09%09%09output = append(output, token)%0A%09%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09%09for len(stack) %3E 0 && precedence(stack%5Blen(stack)-1%5D) %3E= precedence(token) %7B%0A%09%09%09%09output = append(output, stack%5Blen(stack)-1%5D)%0A%09%09%09%09stack = stack%5B:len(stack)-1%5D%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09stack = append(stack, token)%0A%0A%09%09%7D%0A%0A%09%09for len(stack) %3E 0 %7B%0A%09%09%09output = append(output, stack%5Blen(stack)-1%5D)%0A%09%09%09stack = stack%5B:len(stack)-1%5D%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%09fmt.Println(strings.Join(output, %22 %22)
+%22fmt%22%0Afunc main() %7B%0A    fmt.Println(%22Hello, World!%22
